userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 21 Xccy swap with reset on leg 1 are not MW compatible
MW id 17 Start date can not be prior to insertion date unless full coupon is activated
MW id 18 IRS fix/fix are not supported in Markitwire
MW id 6 Not possible in VCON to book Fixed Fixed XXCY
MW id 8 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay 1.2500% on fixed leg 10,000,000 Receive 0.3000% on fixed leg 11,000,000 Expiry 29 jul 2016
Dodd Frank Eligible.Client is a special entity.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
